title: Secret of the Water Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Bo's family is in danger—can the Dragon Masters protect the Dragon Stone? 💧

q.en: What does Bo find on his pillow that makes him worried?
q.zh: 博在枕头上发现了什么，让他忧心忡忡？

explain.en: A black feather lies on Bo's pillow; it is the symbol of the Raven Guard and comes with a threatening note.
explain.zh: 博的枕头上有一根黑色羽毛，那是乌鸦卫队的标志，还附带着一张威胁的字条。

q.en: Why does Bo try to steal the Dragon Stone?
q.zh: 博为什么要去偷龙石块？

options.en: His family is imprisoned and he must free them
options.zh: 他的家人被关押，他必须救他们

options.en: He wants a pet dragon according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他想要一条宠物龙（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A note with the feather says Emperor Song has put Bo's family in prison and will free them only if Bo steals the Dragon Stone.
explain.zh: 羽毛旁的纸条说宋皇帝把博的家人关进了监狱，只有博偷来龙石块才会放人。

q.en: What is Shu's secret power as a Water Dragon?
q.zh: 水龙舒的秘密能力是什么？

options.en: She can fly without wings according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她能无翅飞行（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She can wash away magic spells

explain.en: Shu can send out a misty blue cloud that washes away dark-magic spells, curing Emperor Song and later Diego.
explain.zh: 舒能吐出蓝色的薄雾，洗去黑魔法咒语，治好了宋皇帝，后来又治好了迪亚哥。

options.en: Black-clad fighters who serve Emperor Song and move silently
options.zh: 侍奉宋皇帝、行动无声的黑衣战士

options.en: Wizards at the castle according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 城堡里的巫师（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The Raven Guard are skilled, silent spies dressed all in black who serve Emperor Song and steal the Dragon Stone.
explain.zh: 乌鸦卫队是身穿黑衣、行动无声的精锐间谍，侍奉宋皇帝，并偷走了龙石块。

q.en: How do the Dragon Masters track down the stolen Dragon Stone?
q.zh: 驯龙师们是怎样找到被偷走的龙石块的？

options.en: With a dream according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用梦境（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: With a magic Finding Charm feather

explain.en: Griffith placed a magic Finding Charm on the stone; a green feather floats in the air and leads them to it.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯在龙石块上施了寻物咒，一根绿色羽毛浮在空中，把他们引向它。

q.en: Whose dark magic is controlling Emperor Song?
q.zh: 是谁的黑魔法控制了宋皇帝？

explain.en: Griffith and Bo realize Maldred placed a dark spell on the emperor, forcing him to demand the Dragon Stone.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯和博意识到马尔德雷对皇帝下了黑咒，逼他索要龙石块。

q.en: How does Shu break the spell on Emperor Song?
q.zh: 舒是怎样解除宋皇帝身上的咒语的？

options.en: A blast of fire according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 喷出一团火（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A blue mist from her mouth rains down on him
options.zh: 她口中吐出的蓝色薄雾落在他身上

explain.en: Shu floats up to the emperor and breathes a misty blue cloud that rains down and washes the dark spell away.
explain.zh: 舒飞到皇帝面前，吐出蓝色薄雾飘落下来，洗去了黑咒。

q.en: Which dragon destroys Maldred's red orbs in Emperor Song's throne room?
q.zh: 在宋皇帝的宫殿里，是哪条龙摧毁了马尔德雷的红色光球？

explain.en: Worm uses the power of his mind to blast the glowing red orbs with green light, destroying them one by one.
explain.zh: 沃姆用意念射出绿光，把发光的红色光球一个接一个地炸毁。

options.en: The ruler of Bo's home kingdom
options.zh: 博的家乡王国的统治者

options.en: King Roland's brother according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 罗兰国王的兄弟（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Emperor Song rules the kingdom Bo comes from; King Roland's soldiers first took Bo from there to be a Dragon Master.
explain.zh: 宋皇帝统治着博的故乡王国；罗兰国王的士兵最初就是从那里把博带去当驯龙师的。

q.en: What does Shu do for the wizard Diego near the end of the book?
q.zh: 在故事结尾，舒为巫师迪亚哥做了什么？

options.en: Teaches him to ride according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 教他骑马（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Washes away a sleep spell so he wakes up
options.zh: 洗去沉睡咒语让他醒来

explain.en: Diego fell into a deep sleep from a spell; Shu's blue mist washes it away and he opens his eyes.
explain.zh: 迪亚哥因咒语陷入沉睡，舒的蓝色薄雾洗去咒语，他睁开了眼睛。
